scripts.validate:docs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['README.md','AGENTS.mdc','docs/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.mdc','docs/MODEL_ROUTING.mdc','docs/CONTEXT_PACKETS.mdc','docs/USAGE_ACCOUNTING.mdc','docs/HYGIENE.mdc','docs/OBSERVABILITY.mdc','docs/VISUAL_STYLE_GUIDE.mdc','docs/design-language/FOUNDATION.mdc','docs/design-language/README.md'].forEach(p=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('Missing '+p)}); console.log('docs present')"
scripts.validate:visual-system: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['product/src/visual-system/tokens.ts','product/src/visual-system/nycta-groovegraph-tokens.css'].forEach(p=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('Missing '+p)}); console.log('visual system tokens present')"
